nameEn: Sabil-Kuttab of Muhammad Ali at al-Nahhasin
whyCandidateMatters: Sabil-Kuttab of Muhammad Ali at al-Nahhasin would broaden the project beyond the current 41-record set and improve district, type, or period coverage.
